title: crataegus celsiana
intro: Crataegus celsiana, also known as the Chinese hawthorn, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China and parts of Asia, belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Crataegus celsiana include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and aid in digestion, making it a popular ingredient in herbal preparations. The plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being incorporated into capsules and tablets, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
